---
title: "24_ESR_plots"
output: html_document
date: "2025-07-23"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# libraries
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
```

# Input params
```{r}
this.year <- 2024
```

# Input data
Read in timeseries that were generated from the VAST model runs in 24_VAST_Runs
```{r}
forage <- #read.csv("2025-07-22/Forage complex/2025-07-22_Surface_ForageComplex_NBS_D.csv") %>% dplyr::select(-c(X, Year.1)) %>%
  read.csv("2025-08-14/Forage complex_ey/2025-08-14_Surface_ForageComplex_NBS_D_ey_ts.csv") %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(X, Year.1)) %>%
  dplyr::rename(forage_kgkm2 = mean,
                forage_sd = SD)


herring <- #read.csv("VAST_Outputs/2025-07-22/Pacific_Herring/2025-07-22_Surface_Herring_NBS_D.csv") %>% 
  read.csv("2025-08-14/Pacific_Herring_ey/2025-08-14_Surface_Herring_EYTS_NBS_D.csv") %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(X, Year.1)) %>%
  dplyr::rename(herring_kgkm2 = mean,
                herring_sd = SD)

pollock <- #read.csv("VAST_Outputs/2025-07-22/Pollock_age0/2025-07-22_Surface_Pollock0_NBS_D.csv") %>% 
  read.csv("2025-08-22/Pollock_age0_ey/2025-08-22_Surface_Pollock0_EYTS_NBS_D.csv") %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(X, Year.1)) %>%
  dplyr::rename(pollock_kgkm2 = mean,
                pollock_sd = SD)

capelin <- #read.csv("VAST_Outputs/2025-07-23/Capelin/2025-07-23_Surface_Capelin_NBS_D.csv") %>% 
  #read.csv("2025-08-25/Capelin_ey/2025-08-25_Surface_Capelin_EYTS_NBS_D.csv") %>%
  read.csv("2025-08-25/Capelin_ObsModel_50/2025-08-25_Surface_Capelin_EYTS_50_NBS_D.csv") %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(X, Year.1)) %>%
  dplyr::rename(capelin_kgkm2 = mean,
                capelin_sd = SD)

NBS.sample.size <- read.csv("Region files/NBS_updated_sample_size_2024.csv") %>%
  dplyr::select(-X) %>% dplyr::rename(n = n..)
```

## SEBS data
```{r}
forage_sebs <- #read.csv("2025-07-22/Forage complex/2025-07-22_Surface_ForageComplex_NBS_D.csv") %>% 
  read.csv("2025-08-27/SEBS/Forage complex_ey/2025-08-27_Surface_ForageComplex_SEBS_D_ey_ts.csv") %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(X, Year.1)) %>%
  dplyr::rename(forage_kgkm2 = mean,
                forage_sd = SD)

SEBS.sample.size <- read.csv("Region files/SEBS_updated_sample_size_2024.csv") %>%
  dplyr::select(-X) %>% dplyr::rename(n = n..)
```


```{r}
nbs.ts <- forage %>%
  left_join(herring, by = "Year") %>%
  left_join(pollock, by = "Year") %>%
  left_join(capelin, by = "Year") %>%
  left_join(NBS.sample.size, by = c("Year" = "sample_year")) %>%
  complete(Year = 2003:this.year) %>%
  mutate(forage_se = forage_sd/sqrt(n),
         herring_se = herring_sd/sqrt(n),
         pollock_se = pollock_sd/sqrt(n),
         capelin_se = capelin_sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  mutate(region = "NBS")

sebs.ts <- forage_sebs %>%
  left_join(SEBS.sample.size, by = c("Year" = "sample_year")) %>%
  complete(Year = 2003:this.year) %>%
  mutate(forage_se = forage_sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  mutate(region = "SEBS")

vast.ts <- full_join(nbs.ts, sebs.ts)
```


# Forage plot
```{r}
forage.plot <- ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = forage_kgkm2, group = region, 
                          color = region), data = vast.ts) +
  geom_point(size=2)+
  geom_line()+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = forage_kgkm2 - forage_se, ymax = forage_kgkm2 + forage_se,
                    group = region, color = region), width=.1, 
                position=position_dodge(0.05)) +
  theme_cowplot(12)+
  ylab(bquote("CPUE (kg/"* ~ km^2*')'))+
  labs(title="Forage complex - Late Summer/Fall Surface Trawl Surveys", x="Year", cex=3)+
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.background = element_rect(colour = "black", linewidth=1))+
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 650)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c('#003366','#0099CC'))+
  #scale_color_manual(values=c('#003366','#0099CC'))+
  geom_point(size=1)
#grid.arrange(p,bottom="",top="",left="",nrow = 1, ncol=1)

forage.plot
```

# pollock plot
```{r}
pollock.plot <- ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = pollock_kgkm2), data = vast.ts) +
  geom_point(size=2)+
  geom_line()+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = pollock_kgkm2 - pollock_se, ymax = pollock_kgkm2 + pollock_se), width=.1, 
                position=position_dodge(0.05)) +
  theme_cowplot(12)+
  ylab(bquote("CPUE (kg/"* ~ km^2*')'))+
  labs(title="Age-0 Pollock - Late Summer/Fall Surface Trawl Surveys", x="Year", cex=3)+
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.background = element_rect(colour = "black", linewidth=1))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 225)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values=c('#003366','#0099CC'))+
  geom_point(size=1)
#grid.arrange(p,bottom="",top="",left="",nrow = 1, ncol=1)

pollock.plot
```

# Herring plot
```{r}
herring.plot <- ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = herring_kgkm2), data = vast.ts) +
  geom_point(size=2)+
  geom_line()+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = herring_kgkm2 - herring_se, ymax = herring_kgkm2 + herring_se), width=.1, 
                position=position_dodge(0.05)) +
  theme_cowplot(12)+
  ylab(bquote("CPUE (kg/"* ~ km^2*')'))+
  labs(title="Pacific herring - Late Summer/Fall Surface Trawl Surveys", x="Year", cex=3)+
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.background = element_rect(colour = "black", linewidth=1))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 200)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values=c('#003366','#0099CC'))+
  geom_point(size=1)
#grid.arrange(p,bottom="",top="",left="",nrow = 1, ncol=1)

herring.plot
```

# Capelin plot
```{r}
caplin.plot <- ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = capelin_kgkm2), data = vast.ts) +
  geom_point(size=2)+
  geom_line()+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = capelin_kgkm2 - capelin_se, ymax = capelin_kgkm2 + capelin_se), width=.1, 
                position=position_dodge(0.05)) +
  theme_cowplot(12)+
  ylab(bquote("CPUE (kg/"* ~ km^2*')'))+
  labs(title="Capelin - Late Summer/Fall Surface Trawl Surveys", x="Year", cex=3)+
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.background = element_rect(colour = "black", linewidth=1))+
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 15)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values=c('#003366','#0099CC'))+
  geom_point(size=1)
#grid.arrange(p,bottom="",top="",left="",nrow = 1, ncol=1)

caplin.plot
```


```{r}
# ggsave(paste0("2025-08-14/", this.year, "_Fall_Herring_timeseries.png"), herring.plot)
# ggsave(paste0("2025-08-22/", this.year, "_Fall_Pollock_timeseries.png"), pollock.plot)
# ggsave(paste0("2025-08-22/", this.year, "_Fall_Forage_timeseries.png"), forage.plot)
# ggsave(paste0("2025-08-25/", this.year, "_Fall_Capelin_timeseries.png"), caplin.plot)
```

# SEBS forage plot
```{r}
sebs.forage.plot <- ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = forage_kgkm2), data = sebs.ts) +
  geom_point(size=2)+
  geom_line()+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = forage_kgkm2 - forage_se, ymax = forage_kgkm2 + forage_se), width=.1, 
                position=position_dodge(0.05)) +
  theme_cowplot(12)+
  ylab(bquote("CPUE (kg/"* ~ km^2*')'))+
  labs(title="SEBS Forage complex - Late Summer/Fall Surface Trawl Surveys", x="Year", cex=3)+
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.background = element_rect(colour = "black", linewidth=1))+
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 650)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values=c('#003366','#0099CC'))+
  geom_point(size=1)
#grid.arrange(p,bottom="",top="",left="",nrow = 1, ncol=1)

sebs.forage.plot
```
